title: Koreatown Youth and Community Center (KYCC)
html:
Koreatown Youth and Community Center (KYCC)

Stub. Los Angeles nonprofit. Yahir's friend (UCLA MPH applicant) works there as a Prevention Specialist focused on substance-use prevention and community greenspace advocacy in Westlake / MacArthur Park. See 2025 06 29 uclamphmissiondraft.
